title: senecio glandulifer
intro: Senecio glandulifer, also known as the glandular ragwort, is a flowering plant species that belongs to the daisy family. The plant has been traditionally used for its medicinal properties, particularly its ability to stimulate digestion, relieve respiratory issues, and support the immune system. The health benefits of Senecio glandulifer include its anti-inflammatory and antiseptic properties, which can help alleviate symptoms of coughs, colds, and skin irritations. Senecio glandulifer is often prepared as a tea, tincture, or infusion, and can also be used topically as an ointment or salve to promote wound healing and skin health.
